Imperial gold forged in Roman foundries

He drank from the waters of Lethe

questions.q: Which minor goddess becomes romantically involved with Leo Valdez during 'The Heroes of Olympus' series?

questions.q: What specific ability does Piper McLean discover she possesses that makes her a powerful asset to the Seven?

choices: September 1st, the first day of school

questions.q: What is the true nature of the pit monster that guards the entrance to the Underworld in Percy's first quest?
choices: A hydra with countless regenerating heads

Paul is a kind man who genuinely cares for Percy

choices: His connection to the sea makes him indecisive

choices: A prophecy involving either Percy or a child of Athena
Death by betrayal from someone she trusts

It channels power directly from Mount Olympus

questions.q: Which god explicitly forbids Percy from entering his domain during the series, creating a major obstacle?

To serve as a royal treasury for King Minos

questions.q: What is the name of the magic item that Annabeth Chase receives from her mother Athena early in the series?

It alters the perception of mortals so they cannot perceive monsters and magic

It is built on Long Island where the Trojan War is said to have influenced events
